name: Perfect Swing
about: The Perfect Swing Golf School and Driving Range is a family-owned facility founded in 1981, offering a comprehensive golf experience with an outdoor driving range and indoor/outdoor teaching areas. It features a serene 15-acre setting with four tiers of natural grass tees and 10 AstroTurf® mats, along with technology-enhanced lessons using high-speed video, launch monitors, and other analytical tools. The venue caters to adult and junior golfers of all skill levels, providing structured programs, private instruction, and seasonal clinics. The driving range is open daily year-round with varying hours, and ball dispensers accept credit cards or cash. Lessons are available by appointment, with options for both in-person and online video lessons to accommodate year-round learning.
why_golfers_like_it: Technology-enhanced lessons with high-speed video and launch monitors for detailed swing analysis
Flexible in-person and online lesson options available year-round
Junior-focused programs with structured curriculum for ages 6-17
Family-owned atmosphere with personalized instruction from a teaching professional
Convenient outdoor practice facility with grass tees and artificial mats

simulator_hardware.notes: Uses a launch monitor/simulator for swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The Perfect Swing provides golf clubs for golfers who need them, though personal clubs are recommended for regular users.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned on-site; the venue focuses on golf instruction and practice.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This is a driving range and golf school, not a full golf course, so 18-hole play is not available.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior golf programs for ages 6-17 and provides a family-friendly environment for learning and practice.
